items_en: 1. The present Protocol, of which the Arabic, Chinese, English, French, Russian and Spanish texts are equally authentic, shall be deposited in the archives of the GLYPH<31> United Nations.
2. The Secretary-General of the GLYPH<31> United Nations shall transmit a certified copy of this Protocol to all States Parties to the Convention and to all States which have signed the GLYPH<31>.
